early_childhood: What did the floor in your kitchen look like?
Where did you sleep when you were very small?
Was there a smell in the house that meant home?
What could you hear from your bed at night?
Where did the light come in, in the mornings?
school_years: What was the walk to school like?
Where in the house did you do your homework?
Was there a room you weren't supposed to go in?
What did you do when it rained?
teens: Where did you go when you wanted to be alone?
What did your bedroom look like?
Was there a place in town that was yours?
later_life: Which of the houses you've lived in do you miss?
What's the first home you remember making your own?

early_childhood: Who picked you up when you cried?
What did your mother's hands look like?
Was there a grandparent you spent time with?
Did your family have a way of eating together?
school_years: Who was the loudest person at the dinner table?
What did your father do during the day?
Did you have a brother or sister you followed around?
teens: Who in your family did you argue with most?
Was there someone who understood you without asking?
middle_life: When did you first feel like the grown-up in the room?
What was the hardest thing to tell your parents?
later_life: Who in your family do you think about the most now?

school_years: What did your first classroom smell like?
Was there a teacher whose name you still remember?
What did you carry your lunch in?
Who did you sit next to?
What did you do at break time?
teens: Was there a subject you secretly loved?
Did you have a best friend in those years?
What did you wear to school?

any: What did you have for breakfast when you were little?
Was there a meal that meant something good was happening?
What did your kitchen smell like on a Sunday?
Is there a dish nobody makes the way they used to?
What was the first thing you learned to cook?

early_childhood: What did you play with before you started school?
Was there a toy you wouldn't sleep without?
school_years: Where did the children in your neighborhood meet up?
What games did you play outside?
Did you have a hiding place?
Who was the fastest kid on the street?
teens: What did you and your friends do on a Saturday?
Was there music you played over and over?

young_adult: Who was the first boss you remember?
What did you wear to work?
How much were you paid, that first time?
middle_life: What was the hardest day at work you can remember?
Did you ever love a job?
Who did you eat lunch with?

teens: Do you remember the first person you had a crush on?
young_adult: Where did you meet the person who became important to you?
What were they wearing the first time you saw them?
What did you do on your first date?
middle_life: What's a small thing they did that you noticed?
later_life: What's something about them you want remembered?

any: What were you doing the day you first left home?
Do you remember the day a child arrived in your life?
Was there a day everything changed?
What did winter sound like where you grew up?
Is there a smell that takes you straight back somewhere?
What song do you associate with a specific summer?
What was the coldest you've ever been?
What did the rain sound like on the roof?

recent: What happened yesterday that was worth remembering?
Is there something small from this week you liked?
Who did you talk to today?
Was there a moment this year that surprised you?
